policies.code_of_conduct: Workshop follows local custom and the agent's verbal instructions.
policies.whistleblower: Workers may speak to the line manager.
policies.human_rights: We hire only those who voluntarily come.
policies.environment: Dye effluent is discharged to the back canal as per local custom.

self_assessment_answers.age_verification_policy: We do not have ID cards on file for all workers; the agency provided them
self_assessment_answers.wage_data_by_role: Migrant workers receive THB 250/day before deductions for housing, transport, and recruitment-fee repayment
self_assessment_answers.passport_location: Held by the workshop for safe-keeping; returned when contract ends
self_assessment_answers.movement: Workers stay in the on-site dormitory; the compound is fenced for safety
self_assessment_answers.communication: Workers may not use cellphones during shift; calls home are permitted on Sundays
self_assessment_answers.hours: Standard 90 hours/week; no day off during high season; overtime is required to meet orders
self_assessment_answers.audit_trail_tier4: Unable to verify the source of grey cloth — it arrives from a small Myanmar mill via the unofficial broker; we cannot audit them
